---
title: "About Me"
---

I am a student developing practical skills in **data analysis, web technologies, and digital presentation**. Through this portfolio, I have applied tools such as **Python, Quarto, and GitHub** to create structured projects that demonstrate both technical ability and clear communication of results.

## Background

::: {.section-card}
Building this portfolio has strengthened my confidence in using **Quarto, GitHub, and Python in a practical context**. I developed stronger organisational skills by structuring pages clearly and maintaining consistency across the site.

This process also improved my ability to present academic work in a **professional and visually effective format**, ensuring that information is clear, accessible, and well-structured.
:::

## Skills

| Skill | How I Used It | Level Developed |
|------|---------------|-----------------|
| Quarto | Built and published a structured portfolio website | Intermediate |
| Git & GitHub | Managed commits, version control, and project progress | Intermediate |
| Python | Developed data analysis and visualisation projects | Intermediate |
| Web Design | Improved layout, styling, and readability | Developing |
| Communication | Presented technical work clearly and professionally | Strong |

## Strengths

::: {.callout-tip}
My key strengths include **organisation, adaptability, attention to detail, and problem-solving**.

I demonstrated organisation by structuring my portfolio clearly and maintaining consistent styling across pages. I showed adaptability by learning new tools such as Quarto and GitHub and applying them effectively. My attention to detail is reflected in the layout, formatting, and clarity of my work.
:::

## Goals

I aim to continue developing my **technical and analytical skills**, particularly in Python and data visualisation.

In the future, I plan to build more complex data-driven projects and further improve my ability to communicate insights clearly. These skills will support both my academic development and progression into a **data-focused career**.
